name: Risotto Milanese
recipeIngredient: 2 packages saffron (can be found in Italian or Spanish section)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in olive oil and sauté onion until golden.
2. Remove sausage meat from skin and crumble it up, then add to the onions.
3. Brown slowly on medium heat.
4. In a separate pot, heat chicken broth with bouillon and keep warm.
5. Add rice to sausage mixture and mix well.
6. Gradually add broth to rice about 1 1/2 cups at a time, cooking until the broth is absorbed.
7. Continue this process until rice is cooked.
8. Before the last cups are added, stir in white wine and saffron.
9. Mix so it doesn't stick.
10. When the rice is done, mix in half cup of grated cheese.
11. Serve hot with extra cheese on the side.
This dish can be a meal in itself or a side dish. It's great for a buffet.
